entries.gt_6db21c4d11e774: If the sergeant says "detail", it is not a request. It is the short road to where people used to ask for help.
entries.gt_6dc9b4ad879fae: go to the barricade, choose a side, or take the pipe by force
entries.gt_6dce608d31ace4: If the liquidator archive asks you to check a file, bring ammo: the Paragraph there shoots before security does.
entries.gt_6e6aa2d0a764e3: Assemblies do not come one at a time. Do not spend your last magazine on the first one.
entries.gt_6ec47445b6f8ae: The Chancery Idol does not chase. It waits for an open office line and a pocket full of forms.
entries.gt_6f78ac696c0a8f: The Paragraph strikes in a straight line and does not like cabinets between you.
entries.gt_6f888197bc8757: crack open the kompromat safe, give a copy to the witness, sell it, or submit it upstairs under protocol
entries.gt_6fad1d7be6d080: A wet filter is cheaper only at the market; in the lungs it costs more.
entries.gt_6fc18b93df0f91: Whoever takes PSI without a stabilizer later pays not with money, but with pulse.
entries.gt_6ffcc1c91ef2e5: A Crawler must be heard before the door becomes your cage.
entries.gt_705503bab69684: If the crate with the red sample is warm, there is no storeroom nearby: the plant is waiting for its feed to come back.
entries.gt_708c84242a212a: In the communal kitchen, a fight needs only an empty pot, a wet list, and one missing spoon.
entries.gt_70b5e3ba01bb22: Rebar rings before the strike. That is its courtesy.
entries.gt_7146aa4c4f9a92: Cured zhelemish takes a hit, but drinks water out of a person faster than the queue at the tap.
entries.gt_717b26fe77ee5c: The stamp room smells of sealing wax when there is no Stamp-Eater nearby.
entries.gt_718844c7060c21: If there is a white screen on the left in someone else's vestibule, do not listen to the announcer and go toward the light.
entries.gt_7194bff6004fd5: Liquidators received a Chernobog memo and went to addresses where tenants no longer open without a witness.
entries.gt_71b4dda7e08f8d: For a PSI clot, cultists will give bread, a candle, and an address best not checked alone.
entries.gt_71b728c939404f: Rzhavnik is frightening on the first lunge, not in a long fight. If it has already jumped, the iron breaks down faster.
entries.gt_71e8756a3a05e4: take the sample with an intact seal and decide: NII log, market, liquidator burn, Ministry, or Yakov
entries.gt_7237598b5751d2: A crooked door from the line is better than a straight promise when the siren is already audible in the corridor.
entries.gt_72427a1fb94cf5: secure trust: bring water, hold the hermodoor, or do not touch the common box
entries.gt_725efc8ec6ed02: False testimony spreads faster than real testimony because it does not need a living witness.
entries.gt_72b8458e9d73b9: The common cabinet by the hermodoor is better checked in front of people: afterward the senior will still ask who stood closer.
entries.gt_72c3370fde32a1: After a killing like that, people at the post speak louder for a minute and count casings.
entries.gt_73293e92e1252a: check whom they managed to lead away from the white coating
entries.gt_735b132ca4b19d: Betonov's notes are not bought for the handwriting: they contain the lower route, the sample cabinet, and the clearance list after the Collectors.
entries.gt_737025955b1014: The Paragraph does not bite. It holds the line while you stand in the doorway.
entries.gt_73b44cef9440ea: enter the library hall, bargain with Margarita, or search the shelves
entries.gt_73ced736958d52: find the nearest kitchen, check the boiler, tap, and exit box before the fight
entries.gt_74027129d27a00: A white cap has grown in the service bypass. Liquidators go there only with a hook pole and a filter.
entries.gt_7410e98b1b5a21: At the cauldron you can buy a portion, steal belyak, give a ration to the sick, or leave before the first frying pan.
entries.gt_747064faf6b7e6: The white Safeguard comes not for noise, but for refusal. If the screen blinks red-blue, back away from the terminal.
entries.gt_74854299067e75: The steam corridor is not just hot: there the burn arrives before the swearing.
entries.gt_74ff44b846404a: The queue is not against justice as long as justice moves toward the window.
entries.gt_75076b07d4905d: check the empty line after the refusal: hide the list, show it to the tenants, or hand it to the patrol
entries.gt_750dd3c4dc64e1: The 88 guard takes a token for the pass, and the patrol takes a pretext to talk with a rifle butt.
entries.gt_752d48e43a1aa3: A stolen card works until the log remembers the fingers.
entries.gt_754e281318ba13: If the source pulls you to look straight at it, go around. NII pays for a blind scraping, not bravery.
entries.gt_755279a3026420: Whoever rides down the red line must decide in advance what to do at someone else's stop.
entries.gt_75b27ac3adb2e5: Errands are run by those who need ammo, a pass, or a place by the hermodoor.
entries.gt_75d8f6753dbeef: The Safeguard is fast, but before the cut it turns white and spreads its blades. A machine between you counts as a wall.
entries.gt_75ebc02dc84b37: The filtering layer after the Lotochnik is taken only from the dry edge; otherwise the haul bites back.
entries.gt_75f7013f6e4d19: find the black market, buy a token, or steal one from the debt box
entries.gt_7602d5e2afe756: Tax Choir of the Meat Threshold
entries.gt_7613659ca09bc7: A complaint without a stamp comes back quietly. A complaint with a stamp comes back with people.
entries.gt_763ead624b51e6: If you see a good pipe on the floor, first check the corner and the former owner.
entries.gt_7649efc6cefebe: There, a record can appear before its reason, so nobody signs the empty line in the log.
entries.gt_76a68a6c3f0e39: skirt the sticky cage along the edge, take the red sample only after cleanup, and decide: surrender, sell, burn, or hide it
entries.gt_76f306f14bf3ea: cut or seal the room growth before it reaches the corridor, and leave the beast itself behind the door if the job is not cleanup
entries.gt_77010986a0f71d: Guides do not buy the map, but proof that there is still somewhere to go back to.
entries.gt_774dde154c9e23: Yakov calls him Ivan Zakharov and says he failed basic topology. Vanka answers that the walls were written off before he was.
entries.gt_7794688a4a0fe2: The Ministry calls it document spoilage; the market calls it a discount for risk.
entries.gt_77fa8270e385d9: find the debt notebook, settle someone else's debt, steal a page, or turn the debtor over to the liquidators
entries.gt_782fb3d5c9759f: If the needle shadow turned its back and is calling you into a dark corridor, stop: light or noise will force it to return weak.
entries.gt_78429e1d6dfd70: The file is alive, but without a cover it is not accepted.
entries.gt_78697bbfe7abf5: In N3, official paper opens the door, and the nearby cashier sells a bypass to those who risk it.
entries.gt_7899a54fd8c7af: check the kitchen after the rumor about the latecomer and do not call him by the old shift
entries.gt_78c7fb3f089a3c: There, the flashlight is lying not for the finder, but for the next breath of air.
entries.gt_78c81593f3075c: A liquidator patrol in the Collectors walks in pairs: one watches the water, the other the dark.
entries.gt_78f143254f376d: check the coupon point, trade water for concentrate, or steal the coupon from the table
entries.gt_798c5a43bb3aea: A door kit in an adult's hands is already a decision, even if it is still in the bag.
entries.gt_79aefffc27575d: The reserve rose above the red mark. Not a holiday, but for a minute the queue stopped creaking.
entries.gt_7a0b49c4bd860d: A dry smell by the lift does not mean safe. It means the water left somewhere before the people did.
entries.gt_7a398e96919e64: The vent tag is given not for courage, but for releasing pressure without a burn.
entries.gt_7a3aa75fe20ea8: If somebody drew three doors and a cross on the packet, it is not a map. It is someone's attempt to return.
entries.gt_7a4d42738692d6: The scientist says it is not about Chernobog's name, but about repeatable reaction at the same addresses.
entries.gt_7a54db40ba73e1: The briquette shop issues concentrate to those who brought raw material or silence.
entries.gt_7a62e73b3dd803: A door is not an argument to a spirit. To it, a wall is a curtain.
entries.gt_7b266b127c0291: If the cell clicked before the announcement, stand like a pawn and wait for the next time check.
entries.gt_7b32ce1fd2b5ef: check the room from a distance, keep the Unperson away, and search the dwelling after the fight
entries.gt_7b39c16f54935e: keep to the dry edge of the bridge, lure the eel out of the water, and only then check the tray
entries.gt_7b6a244dafff11: take the sand as evidence, but keep it separate from the rations
entries.gt_7b7f2b8adccc5a: after the all-clear, check the old kitchen, the new wall, and the nearest tap
entries.gt_7bbaaa48bf6b28: check the depot, take the fuse, and leave the white loop for retreat
entries.gt_7c665b04933032: write down the door number from the dream and check it against the scheme in the morning before taking the shortcut
entries.gt_7cd21f0e40c13d: check the training hall and take the map before the next samosbor
entries.gt_7ce1bf528f275c: if the seal on the white sample is broken, do not look at the glass: give Pavel a report or give it to Egor to hide
entries.gt_7d61d905ff9f4d: At the market there is water without a queue; at the kitchen there is a queue without water. The fastest people move between them.
entries.gt_7d6335d138e9ab: The sealing wax there is not for beauty: with it, the pass stops being turned back at the window.
entries.gt_7d69d65925407c: Only those who later carry a register or a knife ask for the old name. Better ask what is needed now.
entries.gt_7d6ac4e39fec33: remove the fuse on Floor 69, sell it to Zhoka, or give it to the repair crew for safe passage
entries.gt_7d747595bf5b10: Krasnyak is sold quietly: sweets in shortage make buyers loud.
entries.gt_7e21976ecc9c45: check the scratching apartment quietly, gather a complaint or report, and do not break the door without an exit
entries.gt_7e3fb555f6a3ac: Whoever argued with the doorwoman about age left with a pensioner's coupon and an empty flask.
entries.gt_7e58dacd75ae80: GPVM Act: one meter by one meter jumped without coordination. You may step on it; return by the scheme.
entries.gt_7e7b4656987515: cover the white window with gray cloth and do not check what is behind it
entries.gt_7f4b054fded49f: find the blue-glow cache, take the hermetic sample, and do not open the ampule in the corridor
entries.gt_7f699cdb7f65cd: Do not check memory, placard, and pass aloud: an extra coincidence goes into the protocol.
entries.gt_7f7707efd10ab8: throw raw meat into a dry side passage, do not stand by the tray, and take the stash only after diverting the worm
entries.gt_7fed8d89740896: The barricade holds as long as someone carries pipes.
entries.gt_8018de64f4723c: If yesterday did not arrive by lunch, do not stand by the door: check the lift and the temporary pass.
entries.gt_8026e66ba495b1: Filters in the medpost are issued to those who cough by list.
entries.gt_8043d02a95dee7: check the room from a distance, keep the even neighbor away, and search the dwelling after the fight
entries.gt_805fd12d499004: The wild bypass can be bought with food, traded for water, taken by force, or left alone. The last option is often the cheapest.
entries.gt_807bd81e210c5e: check the refusal office from cover and take the form after the fight
entries.gt_808d97ee6db62b: The wild cauldron has three rules: do not make noise, do not look in the sack, do not ask the old name.
entries.gt_80d617cffba6fe: The Gorging Beast smells the pocket first, then the face. Keep food in a box or throw meat away from your route.
entries.gt_80df2a9f80b711: get a dry filter before the route and keep it separate from wet cloth
entries.gt_8168518fb21061: There are no dry conversations at the water-meter post.
entries.gt_81854cbb27ea5a: If the bridge drops under your feet, do not climb down after the eel: shoot from the dry edge.
entries.gt_81f04775101193: If you are carrying an archive stack, put the extra papers in a cabinet: paper greed smells farther than blood.
entries.gt_8261189963bd30: The airlock shows who belongs when something scrapes outside.
entries.gt_827f22d0b55e25: A handgun in the Living Zone is not for arguments, but for breaking distance.
entries.gt_82b0438ea515e3: The quiet cell does not call you into the choir. It simply leaves a coupon behind the calendar, where neighbors do not look.
entries.gt_82ddecaaa357bf: After the volley there is a short pause: close the distance then, before it loads the next line.
entries.gt_82f4a26d72faab: People speak calmly about buying off the books; worse is when the name stayed in the notebook.
entries.gt_834f38ee89f1eb: Yakov compared the red erasures with the instruments: the jar sweated over the same surnames.
entries.gt_835a57f8828670: The beast moves behind the wall as if the wall lets it through.
entries.gt_837162f58d39ce: If a neighbor joined the concrete circle, check the door: it may have become thicker on your side.
entries.gt_83a224c7d8e68a: Whoever kept quiet about the receipt got bread left by the radiator without a note. That is an answer too.
entries.gt_83d23315d4724d: If you are looking for armor plate, look for the shop with long paired cuts. Just bring buckshot.
entries.gt_83ec25572f0b8c: You do not look for a medical card at the doctor: it is hidden where people cough by list.
entries.gt_842299c7b0dd88: Forged stubs are bought in the stamp room while the Stamp-Eater has not scented them.
entries.gt_84503c51ce7d6c: Sanitarian Bort is rude to everyone equally, but first he drags those who have already gone silent.
entries.gt_84a41bc69ab6a4: take the raid list and choose: warn, sell, hide, or hand it to the liquidators
entries.gt_84e75d0df9004b: The Betonnik is not fast. It simply decides where the passage ends.
entries.gt_84f02f28dd5a44: A crooked seal can be hidden under a fake audit, but then the rumor sells you cheaper than the market.
entries.gt_85155d82458701: If a neighbor asks for a signature in the far corner, check the door, pass, and reflection first.
entries.gt_8547d4aa129c52: On dry floor, the eel is angry, but no longer dictates the tempo.
entries.gt_855ebf17a72c62: They led three out of the smoke-filled kitchen, then welded the door with the fourth voice inside.
entries.gt_85a42012e779ec: keep to the right edge of the hot contour, remove the vent tag, and do not linger by the booth
entries.gt_85d7f41bffab16: The senior still writes about those who say little: where he stood, what he carried, why he had no water.
entries.gt_861747f7e2ed0a: Matka does not birth a legend. She warms the wall and turns the room into brood.
entries.gt_86adaa8bbd70e6: enter the medpost, buy a bandage, trade a favor, or steal one from under the log
entries.gt_86b708934fbd6f: If an apartment smells of bread, ash, and a wet receipt, they sell the route there more quietly than the queue.
entries.gt_86ca722e387398: The lift recently brought in another floor's smell.
entries.gt_87175fe077befa: enter through the shower bypass, remove the vent tag, and leave before overheating
entries.gt_8727bd1deb7e07: If the hand trembles after the clot exactly by cells, do not argue with the instrument technician.
entries.gt_87f8a6077090bf: If an empty train is breathing on the platform, hide behind the kiosk and let the doors close.
entries.gt_88001d0a7e08f4: If the dark body bounced back and a second one stayed behind, hold the bright exit and do not step into the trace.
entries.gt_880e9e7c42e733: The medpost is safe exactly until the first queue of wounded.
entries.gt_885ac18ca0de04: The Stamp-Eater scents paper better than a secretary.
entries.gt_88a2839cb7ed19: In Yakov's laboratory, the experiment log smells of iodine even on an empty page.
entries.gt_88a5f533041c3f: If you ended up in the wrong place, do not argue with the map: put a mark by the door and look for a familiar corridor number.
entries.gt_88db2d789d6419: The brigade's cabinet key does not get lost. Outsiders do not get it without Sasha or a crowbar.
entries.gt_88dbc1242f904e: The shop issues things slowly. Too slowly for the hungry.
entries.gt_891cc07e7a1900: bring the antibiotic to Sima, steal it from the cabinet, or keep it for yourself and live with that
entries.gt_892d1f5f80d9a5: If the lab assistant sold the map, look not for a secret, but for the shiftmate's empty cabinet.
entries.gt_893bd0e3f6019e: The quiet neighbor's route went neither to Barni nor Vanka. Now the debt is small, but alive.
entries.gt_8946a95710db32: A flashlight makes the Fogger more honest for a couple of breaths: red joints flare where the body is real.
entries.gt_8957b7b11dd725: bring bandages to Kruglov, buy medicine, steal from the cabinet, or report the theft to the orderly
entries.gt_895b433de29a17: check the office with the stamp, take the form, and do not sign the empty field
entries.gt_8973cb89c8f484: The Bonecutter does not jump right away: first it raises the saws and scrapes the air with them.
entries.gt_899c6a30c9bfc2: Margarita knows where the volume with margin notes lies, but takes payment in water, a candle, or a favor.
entries.gt_89a2c75e84ffdb: In gray fog, the silhouette often stands somewhere other than where the joint crunches.
entries.gt_89d95bc23b2799: Hardened Rebar moves slowly, but the first fear usually spends the wrong magazine.
entries.gt_8a0c0c08553d58: Nina Tabletkina's bandages do not run out; they get more expensive.
entries.gt_8a501bb0dbc6af: check the scheme by shaft N-089 before boarding the warm cabin
entries.gt_8a68724e4cbb39: The pump room has a dry threshold beside the tray. There the Lotochnik loses armor before it reaches you.
entries.gt_8aa13613a0a953: bring the sanitary kit, close the cauldron, and decide whom to turn in for the spoiled dinner
entries.gt_8ae33cb9c9997e: lead the Eyes away from the lamp line, close in after the volley, and take the lamp only after the pause
entries.gt_8b096240dcbd73: find the OBZH office, help with the first-aid kit, check the shelter, and decide whether to repair the torn opening
entries.gt_8b1df6388228ec: accept the cleanup, find the altar door, kill the nightmare, and leave by the same corridor
entries.gt_8b382bea05bd09: check the warehouse line, do not hold the door with your body, and shoot the Crawler down on a straight retreat
entries.gt_8b44c98f54e98d: reach the locked bathroom, carry out the people or the rolls, and do not stand barefoot
entries.gt_8ba5a500648229: Numbered lifts break loose more often when the fuses in N-089 are wet.
entries.gt_8bc295d454963c: The concentrate coupon can be traded from the water queue while the storekeeper counts the wrong way.
entries.gt_8bc2a4e58eef39: enter the cold chamber, take the tag, and do not approach the one who already knows the box number
entries.gt_8bef15885e8432: Matka does not fight alone: before her, brood is usually already crawling.
entries.gt_8bf6b2beb5f698: If the jaw opened at the smell, do not stand by the bait: its miss is long, and its hit is short.
entries.gt_8c2636c2e87d36: A welded section is called preserved in the report: after all, nobody loses it a second time.
entries.gt_8c67c34e68ec60: The neighbor says the liquidators saved her son. Her husband says they did not explain whom they sealed afterward.
entries.gt_8c780707e4478b: On platform nineteen, a ticket is needed even by those going nowhere.
entries.gt_8d5671e92e16d1: The floor workers hold the border with a door, a price, and guards. Whoever does not understand meets the guards.
entries.gt_8d573e4cf1e3ad: On a dry straight passage, he is still thick, but he no longer dictates the tempo. Do not argue in water.
entries.gt_8d57c8ed49b29d: find the OBZH classroom, install the kit in the opening, lead the children to the gym, or carry the kit to your own shelter
entries.gt_8d9ae6026ea854: Where a resource has returned above threshold, the trader is first to put on a calm face.
entries.gt_8daef1db484805: check the fog zone after the all-clear, take the candle, or leave before the cultist list
entries.gt_8db4c10d8064c7: find the emergency box, check surnames in front of witnesses, and decide whom to show the list
entries.gt_8e0c31766af8f2: The Assembly is weak, but reaches you before thought: a wide passage and a cheap shot are better than panic.
entries.gt_8e229f67192e9f: A child knocked at the hermodoor and named the apartment correctly, only the floor was not ours.
entries.gt_8e383f5a0160bc: If you hear wet blows behind the wall, count your ammo before entering.
entries.gt_8e42fc541794bc: A man with a coupon to the wrong place argued at the medpost until the nurse took his certificate instead of his voice.
entries.gt_8f1dcea98374d3: Look for ammo where things recently became too calm.
entries.gt_8f1eee656f4b49: Lead the Shadow into a wide passage: after the first lunge, it has a short empty pause.
entries.gt_8f2775a7a44f47: Whoever returned with the objective bought the floor a little silence. The window is already looking for the next surname.
entries.gt_8f3b321779f8e4: Tomorrow they charge a penalty for overuse. You can pay in rubles, sleep, or someone else's queue.
entries.gt_8f3d1fe4b9806c: There is a blue hermobox in the Collectors. The lab assistant says the light inside blinks in time with the lamps behind the glass.
entries.gt_8f3d5dcc7ef2b5: keep the white lamps in sight and return by them after the wrong stop
entries.gt_8f82ec8649364b: After the field report, cult signs start to smell of ammo.
entries.gt_8fb4a2c2e8cfdb: A Deadman sometimes walks to the old apartment. Lead it out of the kitchen into an empty passage before the neighbors stand in the doors.
entries.gt_8fb5f0a653f061: If the corridor shuddered once, get around the corner: noise and fire buy seconds.
entries.gt_8ff3a230d8c58c: A man returned after ten cycles and asked for lunch. The commission ruled him untimely.
entries.gt_900c903990af6c: The locksmith lost his keys, hammer, and patience. The rusty ones call it the rite of returning iron.
entries.gt_90234c99536b02: replenish the common reserve with water or take a ration in front of witnesses
entries.gt_904a9f40e4a195: The medics keep antidepressants farther than bandages: insomnia does not bleed, but its queue is worse.
entries.gt_904e0432057c94: A black hand beside a bread crumb means: someone helped here and expects you not to call it a debt.
entries.gt_90c61944261511: The metro makes mistakes with the voice before it makes mistakes with the doors.
entries.gt_90cdeb9b504a2b: At the OBZH school, the door is torn off, but the rules hang straight.
entries.gt_91722cb6681d55: A repeat stop likes those who go out first to check the name.
entries.gt_91c92d05f8e28e: The illegal print shop prints bulletins and grounds for a search.
entries.gt_91d1fe9099f311: take the sample only in glass and surrender it to the scientist at once
entries.gt_91f7776ebb348e: do not chase the silhouette in the fog pocket: hold the corner, shine light or leave the fog, and strike the black-red center
entries.gt_92082812d735b3: Vera Poteryashkina knows where the door was moved if you bring her water, not a threat.
entries.gt_922dd451ece887: The concentrate coupon smells of the press and wet cardboard.
entries.gt_9230b85c6503b7: If you want to hear the truth, wait until the smoking room starts lying for the second round.
entries.gt_9236bc0d251829: find the witness, trade alcohol for testimony, or hide him before the patrol
entries.gt_92663ff49dd4c7: The reward shelf by the threshold stands to the side: if the center gets noisy, take from the edge and leave by the marked loop.
entries.gt_9287698854d27b: If Margarita whispers about the lower circle, count ammo before the lift, not after the door.
entries.gt_92fe962a3ef9f0: enter through the anteroom, prepare light or sealant, then take the black sample from the false NII jar
entries.gt_93039f951dca05: drag the witness away from the frame before the third look or leave without him
entries.gt_93257bc56642bc: hold the door, finish the Assembly by the box, and take the candle only in front of witnesses
entries.gt_9349c12841c34f: In Counting Room 88, the antibiotic gets more expensive after every siren.
entries.gt_9371ac7837619e: find the dark crack, seal the source with sealant or burn it out with fire, and draw the bodies away with bait only for a while
entries.gt_938b8fee63a3df: At the airlock they do not argue. They count breaths there.
entries.gt_93b5de73527acf: Leave the knife and panic pistol for something else: here you need to knock down the slabs, and only then finish the iron.
entries.gt_93ef48423b90a6: If the shadow stayed where the person has already left, do not chase it into the corner.
entries.gt_9406439a04e198: do not chase the afterimage at the void seam: stand, shine light, or fall back to a bright pocket
entries.gt_945e3eb53c7ded: A denunciation is a short road through someone else's life.
entries.gt_949b074120dc61: Capsules from the lower pipe often arrive with pressure marks: read the numbers before turning the valve.
entries.gt_94a5a479f34b11: In charge dispatch 089, the exit cabinet is restocked after shift while Nazar checks expenditure.
entries.gt_94a90159627124: The diver cache is visible only to someone with enough light to return.
entries.gt_94e01d3b8dbe52: seal the sand with sealant, surrender it to NII, or keep it separate from food and papers
entries.gt_95036c08e664b0: If you are going after the photograph, verify the lift and the witness: sometimes it is just someone else's way to die outside a corridor.
entries.gt_95154f05e37ddc: A Tube Eel in water is fast as bad news.
entries.gt_954519b485dbe0: Black Slime is not dark for beauty: it waits in a dirty line of sight.
entries.gt_954a4cebe445ce: If you need a document, look not for a door into the Ministry, but for the card archive people are afraid to touch.
entries.gt_95681e03c35dc9: If pneumomail promises an easy archive without guards, count it as noise, not an order.
entries.gt_9579a24cd2c208: The Borshchemant poisons the kitchen not with venom, but with someone else's seasoning without permission.
entries.gt_95992cea89c67b: The Choir Matka's children are not infinite, but they make the corridor finite.
entries.gt_95acb6ab934f2d: The dry gasket there is worth more than a brave step: steam burns the brave the same as cowards.
entries.gt_960a927d578303: An official stub does not fall from the sky: it lies in the Pass Bureau and waits for a stamp.
entries.gt_96140f1548e536: The barricaded flight holds on pipes and bad promises.
entries.gt_961eb331224afb: The Deprived does not tear; it writes off heat. One contact is bearable, the second dries the throat and legs.
entries.gt_9665e2509727eb: The scientists carried the white scraping out in glass, and the glass was immediately wrapped in gray cloth.
entries.gt_970417dc452cb0: intercept the emergency list and decide: hide the surname, surrender the debt, or sell the line
entries.gt_9745f4d7d4e56c: lock food in the container, throw meat into a side passage, and strike after the failed lunge
entries.gt_97b654a42c52f4: enter the inspection archive, steal the card, or make a deal with the keeper
entries.gt_97e7d4ec601b02: The shop stopped not from fatigue. It lacks raw material or space.
entries.gt_98bb37118bced5: The old pneumotube knocks three times before the riser fork where someone else's tag hangs.
entries.gt_98dee5c4ffd801: leave expensive papers in the cabinet, throw an empty form aside, and hit the Kontorshchik by the shelf after the grip breaks
entries.gt_98f6ed71d627e5: A dirty filter after OVS smells of someone else's sleep, and a clean one costs as much as a small certificate.
entries.gt_9935f7f811d743: The black NII jar stands in the room where reversed fingerprints appear on the glass.
entries.gt_993e79eae75b56: Rebar after a fight is not lying there for nothing: nearby there is usually blood, an empty pocket, or a trace to a door.
entries.gt_9951cc606c5f6c: take the fast-ones cleanup from the liquidators, hold a wide corridor, and put the Assemblies down before the turn
entries.gt_995f8517fbb535: The cook can be kind, but kindness here is measured by the extra spoon.
entries.gt_999491d041ce38: Throw the light aside, then go darker. If it turned its shoulder toward the lamp, the way is open for a couple of breaths.
